response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling experience with a focus on web, mobile, and desktop systems, but his background lacks direct alignment with embedded networking security features. While he has C/C++ experience and Linux exposure, his recent work emphasizes higher-level languages and frameworks, with limited evidence of deep embedded systems or networking security expertise.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (10+ years) with a focus on testability and craftsmanship.
Proven ability to work across the stack, including low-latency systems and real-time data processing.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating initiative and technical depth.
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with embedded firmware or LAN-switch products, a core requirement for the role.
No mention of Japanese language proficiency, which is a required qualification.
Recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, diverging from C/Linux kernel focus.
